things.name: Great Wall of China (Mutianyu)
things.description: One of the world's greatest wonders — Mutianyu section has a cable car and toboggan run, 70 km from Beijing

things.name: Forbidden City (Palace Museum)
things.description: The world's largest palace complex — 980 buildings and 9,999 rooms housing 1.8 million imperial artefacts

things.name: Tiananmen Square
things.description: The world's largest public square — witness the daily flag-raising ceremony at sunrise

things.name: Temple of Heaven
things.description: Imperial temple complex where emperors prayed for good harvests — surrounded by beautiful parkland

things.name: Summer Palace
things.description: Vast imperial garden with Kunming Lake, the Marble Boat and the Long Corridor with 14,000 paintings

things.name: National Museum of China
things.description: The world's most visited museum with the complete history of Chinese civilization over 5,000 years

things.name: Hutong Tour (Nanluoguxiang)
things.description: Explore ancient alleyway neighbourhoods by rickshaw — traditional courtyard houses and local street food

things.name: 798 Art District
things.description: Former military factory complex transformed into China's most vibrant contemporary art and design district

things.name: Peking Duck Dinner
things.description: Beijing's most famous dish — visit Quanjude (since 1864) or the Duck de Chine for the authentic experience

things.name: Ming Tombs
things.description: Sacred burial valley of 13 Ming Dynasty emperors — 50 km north with the magnificent Spirit Way approach
